year2026.title: New Year
year2026.description: Celebration of the beginning of the New Year.

year2026.title: Republic Day
year2026.description: Commemorates the adoption of the Constitution of India.

year2026.title: Holi
year2026.description: Festival of colors celebrating the arrival of spring.

year2026.title: Good Friday
year2026.description: Christian holiday commemorating the crucifixion of Jesus Christ.

year2026.title: Labour Day / Maharashtra Day
year2026.description: Honors workers and marks Maharashtra state formation.

year2026.title: Bakrid / Eid al-Adha
year2026.description: Islamic festival commemorating Prophet Ibrahim’s devotion.

year2026.title: Independence Day
year2026.description: Celebrates India’s independence from British rule.

year2026.title: Onam
year2026.description: Harvest festival of Kerala honoring King Mahabali.

year2026.title: Diwali
year2026.description: Festival of lights symbolizing the victory of good over evil.

year2026.title: Bhai Dooj
year2026.description: Celebrates the bond between brothers and sisters.

year2026.title: Christmas
year2026.description: Celebrates the birth of Jesus Christ.
